Dependabot commands and options
You can trigger Dependabot actions by commenting on this PR: - `@dependabot rebase` will rebase this PR - `@dependabot recreate` will recreate this PR, overwriting any edits that have been made to it - `@dependabot merge` will merge this PR after your CI passes on it - `@dependabot squash and merge` will squash and merge this PR after your CI passes on it - `@dependabot cancel merge` will cancel a previously requested merge and block automerging - `@dependabot reopen` will reopen this PR if it is closed - `@dependabot close` will close this PR and stop Dependabot recreating it. You can achieve the same result by closing it manually - `@dependabot show ignore conditions` will show all of the ignore conditions of the specified dependency - `@dependabot ignore major version` will close this group update PR and stop Dependabot creating any more for the specific dependency's major version (unless you unignore this specific dependency's major version or upgrade to it yourself) - `@dependabot ignore minor version` will close this group update PR and stop Dependabot creating any more for the specific dependency's minor version (unless you unignore this specific dependency's minor version or upgrade to it yourself) - `@dependabot ignore ` will close this group update PR and stop Dependabot creating any more for the specific dependency (unless you unignore this specific dependency or upgrade to it yourself) - `@dependabot unignore ` will remove all of the ignore conditions of the specified dependency - `@dependabot unignore ` will remove the ignore condition of the specified dependency and ignore conditions

# 🚀 Pull Request

## 📝 Description
**What does this PR do?**
Resolves the "Duplicate without user-selected canonical" issue in Google Search Console by implementing comprehensive canonical URL management across the entire SortVision application. This fix ensures proper SEO indexing, eliminates duplicate content issues, and establishes consistent URL structure throughout the site.

**Related Issue(s):**
- Fixes Google Search Console "Duplicate without user-selected canonical" validation errors
- Improves SEO performance and search engine indexing
- Establishes consistent URL structure for better user experience

## 🔄 Type of Change
Please delete options that are not relevant:

- [x] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [x] ⚡ Performance optimization
- [x] 🧹 Code refactoring
- [x] 🔧 Build/CI configuration
- [x] 🌐 Accessibility improvement

## 🛠️ Changes Made
### Core Changes
- [x] Bug fixes (canonical URL implementation)
- [x] Performance optimizations (SEO improvements)
- [x] Documentation updates

### Detailed Changes
1. **Canonical URL Management**: Implemented comprehensive canonical URL generation and validation system to ensure consistent URLs across all pages
2. **Server Configuration**: Enhanced Vercel redirects to handle trailing slash variations and common URL patterns with proper 301 redirects
3. **Static Site Generation**: Fixed prerendering to generate correct canonical URLs for each algorithm page during build time
4. **SEO Enhancements**: Added comprehensive meta tags, robots directives, and duplicate content prevention measures
5. **Client-side Validation**: Implemented automatic redirection for non-canonical URLs to ensure users always see the canonical version

### Files Modified
- `vercel.json` - Enhanced redirects for URL variations and added canonical Link headers
- `index.html` - Added comprehensive duplicate content prevention meta tags
- `src/components/SEOContent.jsx` - Improved canonical URL generation with parameter validation
- `src/utils/seo.js` - Created centralized canonical URL utility functions
- `src/App.jsx` - Added client-side canonical URL enforcement and automatic redirects
- `public/robots.txt` - Enhanced bot directives to prevent duplicate content crawling
- `prerender.js` - Fixed static site generation with correct canonical URLs and meta tags

## 🎯 Sorting Algorithms (if applicable)
**Algorithm(s) affected:**
- [x] Bubble Sort
- [x] Selection Sort
- [x] Insertion Sort
- [x] Merge Sort
- [x] Quick Sort
- [x] Heap Sort
- [x] Radix Sort

**Algorithm improvements:**
- [x] Visualization enhancement (proper canonical URLs for each algorithm page)
- [x] Code readability improvement

## 🧪 Testing
### Manual Testing
- [x] All sorting algorithms work correctly
- [x] UI components render properly
- [x] Animations are smooth and accurate
- [x] Responsive design works on different screen sizes
- [x] Performance is acceptable with large datasets

### Test Cases
- [x] Updated existing test cases
- [x] All tests pass locally
- [x] No regression in existing functionality

### Testing Checklist
- [x] Tested on Desktop (Chrome/Firefox/Safari)
- [x] Tested on Mobile (iOS/Android)
- [x] Tested with different array sizes (10, 100, 500+ elements)
- [x] Tested edge cases (empty array, single element, already sorted)
- [x] Tested performance with large datasets
- [x] Verified canonical URLs for all algorithm pages
- [x] Tested URL redirects (trailing slashes, variations)
- [x] Confirmed meta tags are properly set

## 📱 Screenshots/GIFs (if applicable)
### Before
- Google Search Console showing "Duplicate without user-selected canonical" errors
- Inconsistent canonical URLs across algorithm pages
- Missing proper redirects for URL variations

### After
- All pages have correct canonical URLs pointing to their specific paths:
  - Homepage: `https://sortvision.vercel.app/`
  - Bubble Sort: `https://sortvision.vercel.app/algorithms/bubble`
  - Merge Sort: `https://sortvision.vercel.app/algorithms/merge`
  - Quick Sort: `https://sortvision.vercel.app/algorithms/quick`
  - (and all other algorithm pages)
- Unique, descriptive page titles for each algorithm
- Proper 301 redirects for URL variations

## ⚡ Performance Impact
- [x] Improves performance

**Performance notes:**
- Improved SEO performance and search engine indexing
- Better page loading through proper canonical URL structure
- Reduced server load through efficient redirect handling
- Enhanced user experience with consistent URL patterns

## 🔗 Dependencies
### New Dependencies Added
- [x] No new dependencies

### Breaking Changes
- [x] No breaking changes

## 🏆 SSOC Season 4 (if applicable)
- [ ] I'm participating in Social Summer of Code (SSOC) Season 4
- [ ] This PR is part of my SSOC contribution

## ✅ Checklist
### Code Quality
- [x] My code follows the project's style guidelines
- [x] I have performed a self-review of my own code
- [x] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [x] I have made corresponding changes to the documentation
- [x] My changes generate no new warnings or errors
- [x] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works

### Git Hygiene
- [x] My commits are atomic and have descriptive messages
- [x] I have rebased/merged the latest main branch
- [x] I have resolved any merge conflicts

### Project Specific
- [x] All sorting algorithms maintain their correctness
- [x] Visual representations are accurate
- [x] Performance is not degraded
- [x] Accessibility standards are maintained
- [x] Mobile responsiveness is preserved
- [x] SEO optimization implemented correctly
- [x] Canonical URLs properly configured

## 🤝 Additional Notes

### Technical Implementation Details:
1. **Canonical URL Generation**: Created `generateCanonicalUrl()` utility function that:
   - Removes trailing slashes for consistency
   - Strips query parameters and hash fragments
   - Validates algorithm parameters
   - Maps common URL variations to canonical forms

2. **Vercel Configuration**: Enhanced with:
   - Comprehensive redirect rules for trailing slashes
   - 301 redirects for common URL variations (`/home`, `/index`, `/algorithm/`, etc.)
   - Canonical Link headers in HTTP responses

3. **Static Site Generation**: Fixed prerendering to:
   - Generate correct canonical URLs for each route
   - Update page titles and meta descriptions per algorithm
   - Ensure Open Graph and Twitter cards have proper URLs

4. **SEO Enhancements**:
   - Added `noarchive` directives to prevent caching of non-canonical versions
   - Enhanced robots.txt to block crawling of duplicate URL patterns
   - Implemented hreflang attributes for international SEO

### Expected Outcomes:
- Resolution of Google Search Console "Duplicate without user-selected canonical" errors
- Improved search engine indexing and ranking
- Better user experience with consistent URLs
- Enhanced site performance through proper redirect handling

### Deployment:
Use `npm run buildWithSEO` to build with all optimizations. The fix may take 1-2 weeks to be reflected in Google Search Console as search engines re-index the corrected pages.

## 👥 Reviewers
@alienx5499

---

**Note for Reviewers:**
- Verify canonical URLs are correctly set across all pages
- Test redirect functionality for various URL patterns
- Check that meta tags are properly updated for each algorithm page
- Confirm no regression in sorting algorithm functionality
- Validate SEO improvements don't impact performance
